content_body:
Planning a Family Reunion in Blue Ridge, GA?

The sunny summer season is upon us, signaling a time for outdoor fun and free time best spent making memories. It is a perfect time for celebrating and enjoying the beauty of nature and gathering together to truly enjoy each member of your family. From the toddler to the elderly, different interests, activity levels, and personalities all need to be taken into account. Making Cabin Rentals of Georgia your annual Family Reunion destination is an easy choice because we offer the most upscale, luxurious, and spacious accommodations in the most scenic locations found in the southeast.

We invite you to enjoy the slower pace of the North Georgia mountains and be amazed at spectacular lake views, creekside retreats, and rushing river lookouts.  Fresh air, endless horizons, and a bounty of unspoiled nature provide a backdrop for all these activities for those in your group who enjoy the outdoors:

 

 

⭑Hiking
⭑Trophy Fly Fishing
⭑Horseback Riding
⭑Whitewater Rafting
⭑Tubing

For those who enjoy the pleasures of life that are a bit less physically challenging, the bustling little town of Blue Ridge offers the following excursions:

 

 

⭑Antique Shops
⭑Art Galleries
⭑Specialty Shops featuring homespun crafts, designs, furniture and accessories
⭑A variety in dining fare - from good ol' southern cooking to fine dining to wine tasting

You can also book a photo shoot with our fantastic photographer, River Underwood Photography, to ensure that the memories made at your retreat are kept forever. He specializes in portrait, wedding, and large group photo sessions and is always open to capturing memories for visitors and guests!

Most importantly, the time spent together at your luxurious retreat is so all-inclusive and activity-rich that you may choose to do very little at all away from home! From indoor gourmet kitchens to outdoor grills, family cook-outs are always the most popular way to laugh and enjoy the skills and talents of the chef in your family. The game rooms featured in our homes are extensive, from board games to billiards to foosball and air hockey, depending on location.  A vast majority of cabins are equipped with large hot tubs, expansive porches, and decks, often with outdoor fireplaces or fire pits to warm up and relax near and extend your day well into the evening. 

 

 

Cabin Rentals of Georgia promises to make your family reunion the most memorable ever. Our properties are grouped by location; riverfront, lake view, wooded or mountain view but all are in a 15-30 minute drive to the town of Blue Ridge so we will be happy to coordinate which homes will meet all your heart's desires as well as all your practical needs.

Click here to view our master calendar to begin planning your family reunion in the Blue Ridge Mountains, and give one of our reservationists a call at 706-432-2140 today!
title: Blue Ridge Family Reunion Cabin Rental Rescue!
